title: hydrangea aspera subsp. sargentiana
intro: Hydrangea aspera subsp. sargentiana is a species of flowering plant in the family Hydrangeaceae, commonly known as a mountain hydrangea or a rough hydrangea. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and inflammation. The health benefits of Hydrangea aspera subsp. sargentiana include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases like heart disease and cancer. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in capsule or tablet form, to harness its medicinal benefits.
